nodes.label: Shared utilities for Sora video tools.
Get the videos directory for a specific product.          Args:         produ
Resolve an ffmpeg executable from PATH or imageio-ffmpeg fallback.
Instantiate a Gemini client from the environment.
Parse video size string into width and height tuple.          Args:         s
Resize an image to match specific dimensions while maintaining aspect ratio.
Turn an image name, local path, or HTTPS URL into a binary file handle for the A
Ensure a resolution string is in WIDTHxHEIGHT format.
Raise if a text field is empty or whitespace only.
Download a specific variant of a video from Sora API.          Args:
Create tool output objects for an image file.          Args:         image_pa
Extract the last frame from a video file.          Args:         video_path:
Generate a linear spritesheet from a video file.          Args:         video
Download a Veo video from Google Gemini API.          Args:         gemini_cl
Download and save Veo video with metadata (spritesheet, thumbnail, last frame).
Download and save video with all metadata (spritesheet, thumbnail, last frame).
